assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 19-21 contain '## Repository Registry' followed by a table with headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and the separator row '|---|---|---|---|' but no data rows beneath.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 23-27 contain '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 29-35 contain '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and '### Limitations' with 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 10-11 state: 'Examined available MCP tools for Serena instances... **No Serena MCP tools discovered** — only built-in tools (Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep) and GitHub MCP tools... are available'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 17-19 state: 'Checked available MCP tools for Atlassian MCP server... **No Atlassian MCP tools discovered** — no tools matching the `mcp__atlassian__` prefix found'. Lines 19-20: 'User chose manual entry (option 2: skip auto-discovery, provide fields manually)'. Lines 21-26 list the manually provided fields.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 12 states: 'Prompted user about continuing without code intelligence — user chose to continue'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 37-41 contain '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 56-59 document: 'Prompted user whether to enable security triage for this project' and 'User declined — Security Configuration section not created'. claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section — the file ends after the Bug Configuration section at line 42.
